title: Additional salary of assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§284. Additional salary of assistant district attorney

           The assistant district attorney of the Thirteenth Judicial District shall receive as compensation for his services, in addition to the annual salary paid by the state, an annual salary of two thousand four hundred dollars, payable monthly. The additional salary shall be paid by the parish of Evangeline.
doc_text:
§284.  Additional salary of assistant district attorney
The assistant district attorney of the Thirteenth Judicial District shall
receive as compensation for his services, in addition to the annual salary paid
by the state, an annual salary of two thousand four hundred dollars, payable
monthly.  The additional salary shall be paid by the parish of Evangeline.
